case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. WB COYLE et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT COYLE, WB

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT COYLE, WB DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-22-2012
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-13-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-23-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR AUG-13-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO ENTER JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $379.50 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DECLARATION OF NON SERIVCE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE WB COYLE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COYLE, WB $5,290.56 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,290.56, AND COSTS PURSUANT TO MEMORANDUM OF COSTS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-15-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-23-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
